command: Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Runtime.WindowsRuntime; $radio = [Windows.Devices.Radios.Radio,Windows.System.Devices,ContentType=WindowsRuntime]::GetRadiosAsync().GetAwaiter().GetResult() | Where-Object { $_.Kind -eq 'Bluetooth' }; if ($radio) { $radio.SetStateAsync([Windows.Devices.Radios.RadioState]::On).GetAwaiter().GetResult(); Write-Output "Bluetooth enabled successfully. State: $($radio.State)" } else { Write-Output 'No Bluetooth radio found on this device' }
